scripts.build:domestic: npm run typecheck && vite build --mode domestic --outDir dist && node scripts/prepare-static.mjs dist && node scripts/precompress.mjs dist
scripts.build:intl: npm run typecheck && vite build --mode international --outDir dist-intl && node scripts/prepare-static.mjs dist-intl && node scripts/precompress.mjs dist-intl
scripts.build:all: npm run build:domestic && npm run build:intl
